wanderer.name: Wanderer
wanderer.description: A traveler with no specific allegiance. Higher resistance to Kingdom-based interference.

engine_passive.name: Blank Slate
engine_passive.description: You can equip blessings from any Kingdom without the 20% Potency penalty.

red_mage.name: Red Mage
red_mage.description: A versatile hybrid who weaves martial prowess with white and black magic.

engine_passive.name: Dualcast
engine_passive.description: After using a Martial tagged blessing, your next Magic blessing has 0 cooldown.

dragoon.name: Dragoon
dragoon.description: A mobile warrior specializing in verticality and piercing strikes.

engine_passive.name: High Jump
engine_passive.description: Your first attack in a room deals 50% more damage if you just entered.

chemist.name: Chemist
chemist.description: A manipulator of chemical reagents and tactical utility.

engine_passive.name: Transmutation
engine_passive.description: You can convert unused stamina into alchemical pips.

temporalist.name: Temporalist
temporalist.description: A master of space and time.

engine_passive.name: Time Dilation
engine_passive.description: Negative Manifestations (Debuffs) on you tick 50% slower.
